# Embracing the Armor of God
## Scripture
"Stand therefore, having fastened on the belt of truth, and having put on the breastplate of righteousness, and, as shoes for your feet, having put on the readiness given by the gospel of peace; in all circumstances take up the shield of faith, with which you can extinguish all the flaming darts of the evil one; and take the helmet of salvation, and the sword of the Spirit, which is the word of God." – Ephesians 6:14-17

## Reflection
As warriors of Christ, we are called to engage in spiritual battles that require strength, courage, and discipline. Our enemy, Satan, is relentless in his pursuit of our souls. However, we have the armor of God at our disposal, which equips us to stand firm against his attacks. The belt of truth reminds us of our identity as sons of God, the breastplate of righteousness protects us from shame and guilt, and the gospel of peace gives us the confidence to face any challenge. As we put on the shield of faith, we can extinguish the fiery darts of doubt and fear. Let us remember that our salvation is our greatest treasure, and the word of God is our most powerful weapon. We must put on this armor daily and use it to defend our minds, hearts, and actions.

## Daily Challenge
Do 25 squats while declaring your identity as a child of God, and remember to put on the armor of God each morning as you face the day.
